changes.value: **File:** `kanban-app/ui/src/components/column-view.tsx:64,89,154,166`\n\nHardcodes `moniker(\"column\", ...)`, `useEntityCommands(\"column\", ...)`, and `getStr(column, \"name\")`. The column entity type and its display field name are baked in rather than schema-driven.
column-view.tsx: hardcoded "column" entity type and "name" field
